top_signals.title: Fed and BoE signal little desire to change monetary policy
top_signals.summary: Whether it was the effects of AI or energy, they saw the benefits of an active hold at the Reykjavik Economic Conference
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Growing US reliance on Chinese biotechs prompts national security fears
top_signals.summary: Global pharmaceutical companies are increasingly looking to China as patents on best-selling medicines expire
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: In deeply red Oklahoma, minimum wage’s biggest 2026 election cycle fight is about to be decided
top_signals.summary: Oklahomans will soon vote on a measure to double the minimum wage, an election issue that may reflect the economic mood and inflation outlook across parties.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Africa’s response to Ebola must be defined by Africa itself
top_signals.summary: International support matters when it aligns with strategies built alongside regional institutions and governments
